ddls:
CREATE TABLE "starships" (
  "starship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each starship */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the starship */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the starship */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the starship */,
  "cost_in_credits" INTEGER /* Cost of the starship in credits */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the starship in meters */,
  "max_atmosphering_speed" TEXT /* Maximum speed in atmosphere */,
  "crew" TEXT /* Crew capacity */,
  "passengers" TEXT /* Passenger capacity */,
  "cargo_capacity" TEXT /* Cargo capacity in kilograms */,
  "consumables" TEXT /* Consumables duration */,
  "hyperdrive_rating" REAL /* Hyperdrive rating */,
  "MGLT" INTEGER /* MGLT (MegaLight) speed */,
  "starship_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the starship class */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the starship (e.g., operational, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "commission_date" TEXT /* Date the starship was commissioned */,
  "decommission_date" TEXT /* Date the starship was decommissioned */,
  "hull_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the starship's hull (e.g., good, damaged, destroyed) */,
  "engine_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the starship's engines (e.g., good, damaged, destroyed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("starship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_starships_starship_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("starship_class_id") REFERENCES starship_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "starship_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each starship class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the starship class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the starship class */,
  "min_crew" INTEGER /* Minimum crew required for the starship class */,
  "max_crew" INTEGER /* Maximum crew capacity for the starship class */,
  "min_passengers" INTEGER /* Minimum passenger capacity for the starship class */,
  "max_passengers" INTEGER /* Maximum passenger capacity for the starship class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "starship_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "starship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starship being maintained */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the maintenance activity */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the maintenance activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance activity (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician performing the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_starship_maintenance_starship_id FOREIGN KEY ("starship_id") REFERENCES starships ("starship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "starship_movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movement */,
  "starship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starship being moved */,
  "start_location" TEXT /* Starting location of the movement */,
  "end_location" TEXT /* Ending location of the movement */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the movement */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the movement */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the movement (e.g., mission, repair) */,
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pilot or crew responsible for the movement */,
  "movement_type" TEXT /* Type of movement (e.g., hyperspace, sublight) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_starship_movements_starship_id FOREIGN KEY ("starship_id") REFERENCES starships ("starship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "starship_budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget entry */,
  "starship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starship */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the budget */,
  "allocated_budget" TEXT /* Allocated budget in credits */,
  "spent_budget" TEXT /* Spent budget in credits */,
  "remaining_budget" TEXT /* Remaining budget in credits */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the budget (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "budget_type" TEXT /* Type of budget (e.g., operating, capital) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_starship_budgets_starship_id FOREIGN KEY ("starship_id") REFERENCES starships ("starship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "starship_equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment entry */,
  "starship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starship */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of the equipment (e.g., weapons, shields, engines) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the equipment installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the equipment (e.g., operational, damaged, replaced) */,
  "maintenance_interval" TEXT /* Maintenance interval for the equipment (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_starship_equipment_starship_id FOREIGN KEY ("starship_id") REFERENCES starships ("starship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "starship_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "starship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starship */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log (e.g., maintenance, movement, budgeting) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message or description of the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the log entry */,
  "log_category" TEXT /* Category of the log entry (e.g., technical, administrative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_starship_logs_starship_id FOREIGN KEY ("starship_id") REFERENCES starships ("starship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_starship_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fleet commander, maintenance engineer, procurement officer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., admin, read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "starship_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "starship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starship */,
  "status_type" TEXT /* Type of the status (e.g., operational, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date of the status update */,
  "status_message" TEXT /* Message or description of the status update */,
  "status_category" TEXT /* Category of the status update (e.g., technical, administrative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_starship_status_starship_id FOREIGN KEY ("starship_id") REFERENCES starships ("starship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "starship_missions" (
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission */,
  "starship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starship assigned to the mission */,
  "mission_name" TEXT /* Name of the mission */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the mission */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the mission */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the mission (e.g., in progress, completed, aborted) */,
  "commander_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commander leading the mission */,
  "mission_type" TEXT /* Type of mission (e.g., combat, reconnaissance, transport) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_starship_missions_commander_id FOREIGN KEY ("commander_id") REFERENCES commanders ("commander_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_starship_missions_starship_id FOREIGN KEY ("starship_id") REFERENCES starships ("starship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commanders" (
  "commander_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commander */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the commander */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the commander */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the commander */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the commander belongs to */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the commander (e.g., years of service, number of missions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commander_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "starship_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "starship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starship involved in the incident */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of the incident (e.g., collision, system failure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the incident (e.g., under investigation, closed) */,
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investigator assigned to the incident */,
  "incident_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident (e.g., minor, major, catastrophic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_starship_incidents_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("investigator_id") REFERENCES investigators ("investigator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_starship_incidents_starship_id FOREIGN KEY ("starship_id") REFERENCES starships ("starship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigators" (
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the investigator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the investigator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the investigator belongs to */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the investigator (e.g., years of service, number of incidents handled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "starship_upgrades" (
  "upgrade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upgrade */,
  "starship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starship being upgraded */,
  "upgrade_name" TEXT /* Name of the upgrade */,
  "upgrade_type" TEXT /* Type of the upgrade (e.g., hardware, software) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the upgrade (e.g., installed, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upgrade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_starship_upgrades_starship_id FOREIGN KEY ("starship_id") REFERENCES starships ("starship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "starship_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of the component (e.g., hardware, software) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component in stock */,
  "unit_cost" INTEGER /* Unit cost of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)
